introSection: Gadget's Go Coaster (Japanese: ガジェットのゴーコースター) is a steel roller coaster located at Tokyo Disneyland in Urayasu, Chiba, Japan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is mirror of the standard 207m Vekoma Junior Coaster. This is due to the entire Toontown are being mirrored compared to the original in Disneyland Park. In addition, the ride uses a chain lift hill which is uncommon for a Vekoma Junior Coaster.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track, the supports alternate between red, blue, yellow and orange.

fullText:
Gadget's Go Coaster (Japanese: ガジェットのゴーコースター) is a steel roller coaster located at Tokyo Disneyland in Urayasu, Chiba, Japan.

This is mirror of the standard 207m Vekoma Junior Coaster. This is due to the entire Toontown are being mirrored compared to the original in Disneyland Park. In addition, the ride uses a chain lift hill which is uncommon for a Vekoma Junior Coaster.

Red track, the supports alternate between red, blue, yellow and orange.
